title: deinandra fasciculata
intro: Deinandra fasciculata, also known as the Mission manzanita or Island manzanita, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the Channel Islands in California, USA. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with potential health benefits including wound healing, pain relief, and digestive issues. Deinandra fasciculata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its medicinal properties have been traditionally utilized in herbal remedies for various health conditions.
